## BaseTogglePanel class

Simple panel that receives its open state via prop, which is responsible of rendering default slot inside a configurable transition.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseTogglePanel extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.basetogglepanel.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the panel content. |
|  [open](./x-components.basetogglepanel.open.md) |  | boolean | Handles if the panel is rendered. It is used with v-if instead of v-show to get better performance. |
